creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad An incredible pop-up has just landed in Covent Garden where you’ll go on a fragrance journey ❤️

This is the @carolinaherrera Good Girl pop-up, celebrating 10 years of the ICONIC fragrance and there’s so much going on here!

❤️ Get scent profiled, pick your favourite scent and get a FREE sample!
📸 Visit the free photo booth and if you’re lucky, your printout might reveal a surprise win, from a FREE, FULL-SIZED scent, a free coffee or pastry,  and more!
☕️ Buy a coffee and a pastry to enjoy by the wonderful @qima.cafe
📝 Get a live poem written for you by their resident poet @olivia.poetess (12pm-4pm)

Share this with all the details 👇
📍Covent Garden East Piazza
🗓️ Friday 6th to Sunday 8th March 2026
⏰ Open daily 10am-7pm

#thingstodoinlondon #carolinaherrera #londonpopup
#goodgirlcarolinaherrera #ad

transcription.text: There's an incredible new pop-up in Covent Garden for 3 days only and there's so much going on here. This is the Carolina Herrera Good Girl pop-up. Step into the Good Girl truck where you'll get the chance to be scent profiled. Pick your favourite scent and you'll get a free sample of your favourite. There's also a free photo booth and if you're lucky you might be a winner where your print out will tell you if you've won a full-size fragrance or a free coffee or pastry. And guys these are so good, buy Kima Cafe and even if you don't win one you can purchase it on site. They even have a resident poet who can write you a free poem. It's on all weekend, find all the details you need in the caption.
